query: Brownfield active intent ranking and scoped find packs
slice_title: Tighten exact plan ID and track ID find packs so direct neighbors beat tangential historical plans
goal: Record progress for `Brownfield active intent ranking and scoped find packs`.
description: Added exact intent-ID discipline for plan and track shaped queries so direct ID artifacts rank first, explicit ID references stay nearby, and tangential planning/history docs are downgraded when an exact ID exists.

git_diff.command: git diff --stat; git diff --name-only; git diff --cached --name-only; git ls-files --others --exclude-standard
git_diff.stat:
.../brownfield-active-intent-ranking/task.json     |   7 +-
 internal/retrieval/exact_anchors.go                | 258 +++++++++++++++++++++
 internal/retrieval/retrieval.go                    |   3 +
 internal/retrieval/retrieval_test.go               |  82 +++++++
 4 files changed, 348 insertions(+), 2 deletions(-)

learnings.summary: Exact plan or slice ID queries such as EV-R1 should activate only when that exact ID exists in the corpus; direct path/title matches stay primary, explicit body references become related neighbors, and non-ID planning docs are dampened.
